name: 11" x 14" Female Portrait Framed Wall Art Canvas - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description: The 11" x 14" Female Portrait Framed Wall Art Canvas by Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee adds a graceful aesthetic to your space. This digital print features a portrait of a woman in neutral tones of black, white and browns. The canvas comes with a frame in black and gold, with a saw tooth mount for easy hanging in bedrooms, dining areas, living rooms or galleries. Add visual interest to your room with the lady oil-like portrait from Threshold, designed with Studio McGee.
